title: Regular Meeting with Public Hearing

matches.context:
C. OPERATIONS  
1. Consider Approval of Bond Oversight Committee Recommendation to Reallocate Bond Funds for the Replacement of Artificial Turf at AC Bible and Monroe Regional Stadiums

reallocate up to $1,600,000 from 2023 Bond Project Line Item: Baseball & Softball Turf to new bond project line items for Artificial Turf at AC Bible and Monroe Regional Stadiums. This motion passed six in favor and one opposed.

summary: 2 turf-related mention(s) found (Artificial Turf); topic(s): Budget / capital expenditure; sentiment(s): Mixed, Positive.
